recommendations.title: Daddy Day Care
recommendations.overview: Two men get laid off and have to become stay-at-home dads when they can't find jobs, which inspires them to open their own day-care center.

recommendations.title: Freaky Friday
recommendations.overview: When an overworked mother and her teenage daughter magically swap bodies, they have just one day to put things right again before mom’s big wedding.

recommendations.title: Middle School: The Worst Years of My Life
recommendations.overview: A quiet teenage artist Rafe Katchadorian has a wild imagination and is sick of middle school and the rules that have been put before him. Rafe and his best friend Leo have come up with a plan: break every rule in the school hand book and as you expec

recommendations.title: Are We Done Yet?
recommendations.overview: Newlyweds Nick and Suzanne decide to move to the suburbs to provide a better life for their two kids. But their idea of a dream home is disturbed by a contractor with a bizarre approach to business.

recommendations.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
recommendations.overview: When a shopping mall is taken over by a gang of organized crooks, it's up to a mild-mannered security guard to save the day.

recommendations.title: A Merry Little Ex-Mas
recommendations.overview: Recently separated, Kate hopes to celebrate one last perfect family Christmas with her soon-to-be ex-husband Everett and their kids before their divorce is final and the house is sold. But her holiday plans are hilariously derailed when Everett unexp

recommendations.title: Next Friday
recommendations.overview: A streetwise man flees South Central Los Angeles heading to the suburbs and his lottery-winner uncle and cousin to avoid a neighborhood thug with a grudge who has just escaped from prison. But trouble soon follows and the suburbs will never be the sa

recommendations.title: Dr. Dolittle 2
recommendations.overview: A group of beavers ask Dr. Dolittle to save their habitat from loggers. The only hope is to get the forest preserved because it's the home of a protected bear, but there's a problem: the bear's the only bear in the forest, so she can't reproduce. Und

recommendations.title: Champions
recommendations.overview: A disgraced basketball coach is given the chance to coach Los Amigos, a team of players who are intellectually disabled, and soon realizes they just might have what it takes to make it to the national championships.

recommendations.title: Glory Road
recommendations.overview: In 1966, Texas Western coach Don Haskins led the first all-black starting line-up for a college basketball team to the NCAA national championship.
